title: bust-validation-error-response
description: Hard-reject validation error response for invalid bust descriptor payloads. Invalid bust payloads are never silently corrected; they are always hard-rejected with explicit per-field diagnostics.

success.description: Always false for validation error responses.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the validation failure.

validationErrors.description: One entry per invalid field. At least one error is always present on a hard-reject response.

field.description: Dot-notation path to the invalid field (e.g. descriptor.faceShape).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the value was rejected (e.g. not a valid enum value).

rejectedValue.description: The exact value that was rejected. May be any JSON type.
